Notice Of Applicaiton And Hearing For Right To Attach Order
Off Calendar Oct-16-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court shares the motions seem repetitive and that there were no oppositions filed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JOSHUA KIM'S Hearing For Right To Attach Order.

Plaintiff Joshua Kim's application for right to attach order is granted as unopposed.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302)
